accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text and correct context about congressional disapproval under the Home Rule Act.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as disapproving and blocking the D.C. Revised Criminal Code Act of 2022.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states passage dates and March 20, 2023, approval date.

correct_entities.why: D.C. Council, D.C. Act 24-789, Home Rule Act all correctly referenced.

correct_figures.why: All dates match the bill text.
